addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7307600959033737984","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"连赚多少钱都没写清楚，一直在说一些无关紧要的事，你到底在写什么呢？最重要的都没写清楚。大家最好想清楚在看，不要浪费时间，每天赚那么多钱到最后连赚多少钱都不知道。看了五百多张，最后居然是这样子的结果。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701434513,"group_id":"7070866594057948199","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3671982236240092"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7070866594057948199","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.03900522e+08"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"4","score_suffix_text":"阅读62小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":117522,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":221421,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7306094462760010511","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"跟之前我看的钓鱼小说差不多的剧情，虽然没有那么无缘无故给钱，但有这个倾向，所以给4星看后面怎么样，目前来说还说得过去没有那么糟糕的事情"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701083527,"group_id":"7070866594057948199","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好👌……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2GWBTHOjob0RT6NyhUlwYLUD40cWP8KmWYL0+kZZt5e","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705984&x-signature=QHDhoc9A4xYYe1ipmBRBiQQhjZY%3D","user_id":"3671982236240092","user_name":"男主角真香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3671982236240092","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7070866594057948199","book_info":{"abstract":"原书名《游钓四海：我靠钓
